scenarios.capability: Security scan: detect hardcoded credentials and container :latest tags
scenarios.reason: Agent reads pipeline YAML from task input and produces a validation report — no runtime pipeline execution required

scenarios.capability: Syntax validation: required fields, stage/job/step hierarchy, task format
scenarios.reason: Agent inspects static YAML structure and reports schema violations — no external API calls required

scenarios.capability: Best practices: display names, task version pinning, caching, timeouts
scenarios.reason: Agent reviews pipeline YAML for best-practice patterns and produces actionable suggestions — entirely static analysis

scenarios.capability: YAML lint: whitespace-significant formatting issues that silently restructure pipeline blocks
scenarios.reason: Agent identifies indentation and trailing-space errors in raw YAML text — no tooling execution required

scenarios.capability: Template validation: detecting violations in referenced template files, not only the entry point
scenarios.reason: Agent reads multiple YAML files provided inline and validates each template — no external file system access required
